allow: Bash(node -e "const v=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const v16=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\('16'\)\); console.log\('Latest v16:', v16[v16.length-1] || 'none'\); const latest=v[v.length-1]; console.log\('Latest overall:', latest\);")

Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>chunks.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const d=JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); console.log\('Version:', d.version\); console.log\('Peer deps:', JSON.stringify\(d.peerDependencies,null,2\)\); console.log\('Engines:', JSON.stringify\(d.engines,null,2\)\); }\);")
